name: Flags SDK
description: Free open-source Vercel library for Next.js and SvelteKit feature flags. Framework-native, provider-agnostic with adapters for LaunchDarkly, Statsig, Optimizely, Hypertune, ConfigCat, DevCycle and Flipt.
